name: Cosmo Chef
short_description: How to play After the game starts, press the start button to display the gameplay screen. You must obtain as many items as you can see in the bottom right, avoiding arrow-shaped obstacles flying from both sides.
detailed_description:
Chef's great adventure in space!

In this space-set game, you're a brave chef who must avoid meteorites and gather precious cooking ingredients.

If you gather all the ingredients, you can advance to the next stage, but if you get hit by a meteorite or collect too many ingredients, your stamina will be reduced.

After passing through a total of six stages, each stage becomes more difficult. Can you complete the best dishes in the midst of the dangers of space?
